No — this is not established. Yeong's draft memo says it is the 'most likely cause' but the memo is explicitly preliminary, not a finding. The crew denied accessing V-412. Marchetti did not adopt the assessment. The system must not commit this as fact.
'Operationally resolved' means the physical problem is fixed and the segment is back in service. It is not a determination of cause, fault, or responsibility. No formal finding has been issued.
